stage0.role: reference lexer, parser, type checker, law checker, interpreter, and C11 backend

stage1.role: Cofn-written compiler for the documented arithmetic Cofn Core subset; Stage 0 builds it as a native executable

stage2.implementation: stage1 compiles its own source and reproduces an equivalent artifact

truthful_status: The repository contains a Cofn-written compiler seed that Stage 0 can build as a native executable. It is not yet fully self-hosting because Stage 1 cannot compile its own source and the Stage 2 fixed-point gate remains open.
